text:
で、最大の問題は
あのディアボイグリシスとかいう
鳥だか龍だかわかんねーヤツだよ！

図体も動きも、とにかくデカくて
モニター越しに見てても
何がなんだかわかんねー！

炎の火柱も凶悪だしなぁ……
ありゃあ、下手な装備で戦ったら
生きて帰ってこれねーわ。

おたくの装備が問題なさそうなら
あいつに挑んでみてくれよ！
無理にとは言わね

So the major issue now is that bird-dragon-
whatever thing called Diaboigryphis!

Everything about it is huge, from its size to
its freakin' leaps, and I can't even tell what
the heck's goin' on through the monitor!

That pillar of fire is brutal, too. If ya go at
it with any old thing equipped, you're gonna
get a one way ticket to meet your maker!

But your equipment looks great, pal, so go
ahead 'n take it on! Of course, I won't force
ya or nothin'.
